titleStmt.title: SII 20.244: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 244. (B.K. No. 36 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒS11VAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the right wall in Śankha-basti in Basti baṇa.

summary.p: This inscription in Sanskrit language refers itself to the reign of Mārasiṁha and is dated in Śaka 890, Vibhava, corresponding to A.D. 968-69.
It registers a grant, by the king, of the village Siggala, to Gaṅga-kandarpajinālaya, a Jaina monastery, apparently called after the king. The grant seems to have been entrusted to Jayadēva-paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti jitaṁ bhagavatā gataghanagaganābhēna padmanābhēna śrīmajjāhnavēyakuḷāmaḷavyō māvabhāsanabhāskaraḥ svakhaḍgai
kaprahārakhaṇḍitamahāśiḷāstaṁbhalabdhabaḷaparākramōdāruṇārigaṇavidāraṇōpalabdhavraṇa vibhūṣaṇabhūṣitaḥ kāṇvāyanasagōtraḥ śrī
mānkoṁguṇivarmmamahārājādhirājaparamēśvara śrīmādhavaprathamanāmadhēya . tadanva yē . Ēkassaṁprati mārasiṁhanṛpatirvikrāntaka
ṇṭhīravaḥ yatratrāsitasāhasōnmadamahāsāmantamattadvipē Indrasyājani paṭṭabandha mahimā nirvighnamityurvvarācakraṁ yasya parākramaṁ pu
rikarē vyāvarṇnayaṁtyaṁgakaiḥ . saśrīkāntākaṭākṣāvaḷilalitarucā mauḷayaścāmarāṇāṁ līḷāvadvāranārīkaravicaḷitayā bāḷavatkuntaḷāntaḥ .
pāḷasē kamaḷapuṭairarppitāṁghriśca rāyakṣmākāntāṁ kīrttibhūpāratidanu bhavatadgaṅgakandarppabhūpaḥ . gadya . sa bhuvanaikamaṁgaḷajinēṁdrani
tyābhiṣēkamaṁgaḷakaḷaśīkritārātikṣitīśakōśāpahārāgatarājyābhīṣēkaratnakaḷaśaḥ śrī satyavākyakoṅguṇivarmmadharmmamahārājādhirājaparamē
śvaraḥ . nijadōrbbaḷabhōgapōtabaḷataḥ siddhāntaratnākaraḥ cāritrātputayōna pātrabaḷatassaṁsāramīnākaraḥ Uttīrṇnasamudīrṇnabhaktivinatai
rāsīdēva dharāgraṇīrgguṇanidhirddēvēṁdrabhaṭṭārakaḥ . Uddāmadāma kaḷinirddaḷanaikavīrastasyēkadēva Iti yōgiṣu dēva Ēkaḥ śiṣyō
yasya bhavyaratnatrayaṁ śirasi yaccaraṇadvayaṁ . va . mahitasya tasya mahitai rmmahatāṁ prathamasya ca prathamaśiṣyatayā
jayadēvapaṁḍita Iti prathitaḥ pra mahimapravīṇaḥ . śakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsara śatēṣvaṣṭasu navatyuttarēṣu pravarttamānē vibhava
saṁvatsarē śaṁkhavasatitīrtthaṁ vasatimastakamaṇḍanasya gaṅgakandarppajinēṁdramaṁdirasya dēvabhōganimittaṁ purigeṟeviṣayāntarvvartinaṁ purigeṟenagarāddakṣiṇa
syāmāśāyāṁ moḷageṟe siggalagrāmaḥ pradattastasya caturāphāṭaśuddhitaḥ prakaṭīkṛ yatē sīmā . pūrvvadigbhāgē bhidācaḷā dakṣiṇā
bhimukhamāgatyāgnēyadiktaṭīkādalataṭākā dradiśisthaḷitaḥ paścimābhimukhaṁ siṁhanimnādāgatya nairṛtyāṁ jvarasarasaḥ kubērakakubhamāgatya
sarasaḥ kuṟuvataṭākāt nimnagamahākṛṣṇataṭākāllaghukṛṣṇataṭākādāgatya pūrvāndiśamīśānabhāgē prōtaṭōgataṭākāddakṣiṇapravā
hakapitthapuḷinādāgatya dakṣiṇadigbhāgamurmiḷasthaḷataḥ pūrvvaprathitēna bhidācaḷēna sīmā samāgatā . sa ca mēdinīva dēśagrāmakūṭakara
bādhāparihāramanōharaḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
